name: ChatGPT
description: ChatGPT is an AI-powered language model developed by OpenAI, capable of generating human-like text based on context and past conversations.

name: Midjourney
description: Midjourney is an independent research lab exploring new mediums of thought and expanding the imaginative powers of the human species through AI image generation.

name: Jasper
description: Jasper is an AI copilot for enterprise marketing teams who want better outcomes, not just faster outputs.

name: Webflow
description: Webflow is a visual web development platform that allows people to design, build, and launch completely custom websites without writing code.
cons: E-commerce is lacking compared to Shopify
pricing: Free starter plan. Basic site plan starts at $14/month.

name: Framer
description: Framer is the web builder for creative pros. Design and publish stunning sites with unparalleled speed and control.
cons: Limited CMS capabilities compared to Webflow
Less suitable for complex web apps
pricing: Free plan available. Mini plan starts at $5/month.

name: WordPress
description: WordPress is open source software you can use to create a beautiful website, blog, or app.
cons: Steeper learning curve for custom development
pricing: Free open-source software. Hosting costs vary.

name: Mailchimp
description: Mailchimp is an all-in-one marketing platform that helps you manage and talk to your clients, customers, and other interested parties.
cons: Customer support can be slow on lower tiers
pricing: Free for up to 500 contacts. Essentials starts at $13/month.

name: ConvertKit
description: ConvertKit is the go-to marketing hub for creators that helps you grow and monetize your audience with ease.
pricing: Free for up to 1,000 subscribers. Creator plan starts at $9/month.

name: ActiveCampaign
description: ActiveCampaign gives you the email marketing, marketing automation, and CRM tools you need to create incredible customer experiences.

name: Asana
description: Asana helps teams orchestrate their work, from small projects to strategic initiatives.
cons: Can be overly complex for simple projects
pricing: Basic is free. Premium starts at $10.99/user/month.

name: Linear
description: Linear is a purpose-built tool for planning and building products. Streamline issues, projects, and product roadmaps.
pricing: Free for small teams. Standard starts at $8/user/month.

name: ClickUp
description: ClickUp is one app to replace them all. It's the future of work. More than just task management - ClickUp offers docs, reminders, goals, calendars, and even an inbox.
cons: Steep learning curve due to feature density
pricing: Free forever plan. Unlimited starts at $7/user/month.
